title: Generation of the HAP1 ATG9A-GFP Cell Line
author: Daniel Bernklau
materials: Mix the solutions and incubate for 00:15:00 at Room temperature .

Subject the positive clones (correct integration, expression of tagged protein at endogenous levels, typical protein pattern in starvation assay, negative for Cas9) to further validation by gDNA isolation (Thermo Scientific Gene Jet #K0721), PCR amplification of the locus and expanded sequencing of the integration site.

steps.title: The plasmid based repair template consists of the following blocks
steps.instruction: The plasmid based repair template consists of the following blocks. A pUC-19 vector serves as backbone for the homology template.

steps.title: Genomic dna (~1400bp) upstream of the...
steps.instruction: Genomic dna (~1400bp) upstream of the ATG9A Stop codon, the CDS of monomeric EGFP, a 3C cleavage site, a FLAG tag and genomic DNA (~1500bp) downstream of and including the ATG9 stop codon. Introduce linkers between the relevant blocks (RRID: Addgene: 244942). Mutate PAM sites (silent if in exon; here, one site was mutated).

steps.title: To generate a nick at the...
steps.instruction: To generate a nick at the desired locus select two guide RNAs close to the region of ATG9A Stop codon by CRISPick and clone into AIO-Puro (RRID: Addgene: 74119) according to the instructions.

steps.title: Grow Hap1 wt cells in 10...
steps.instruction: Grow Hap1 wt cells in 10 cm culture dishes (Eppendorf #0030702115) until ~70% confluent.

steps.title: Change the medium to fresh IMDM...
steps.instruction: Change the medium to fresh IMDM +P/S +10%FCS 00:30:00 before the transfection.

steps.title: Add 30 µL of FuGENE 6...
steps.instruction: Add 30 µL of FuGENE 6 transfection reagent (Promega, Cat# E2691) to 500 µL OptiMEM (Gibco 11058021).

steps.title: Add 5 µg of AIO-Puro containing...
steps.instruction: Add 5 µg of AIO-Puro containing gRNAs and 5 µg of homology template plasmid to 500 µL of OptiMEM.

steps.title: Incubate for 5' individually at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5' individually at Room temperature .

steps.title: Add dropwise to the cells
steps.instruction: Add dropwise to the cells.

steps.title: Additionally prepare non-transfected control cells
steps.instruction: Additionally prepare non-transfected control cells.

steps.title: 24:00:00 after transfection change the medium...
steps.instruction: 24:00:00 after transfection change the medium to IMDM +P/S + 10%FCS containing 5 ug/ml Puromycin.

steps.title: Apply selection for 48:00:00 or until...
steps.instruction: Apply selection for 48:00:00 or until non-transfected control cells are dead.

steps.title: Enrich for GFP positive cells via FACS bulk sort
steps.instruction: Enrich for GFP positive cells via FACS bulk sort.

steps.title: Expand cells in a 10 cm dish until confluent
steps.instruction: Expand cells in a 10 cm dish until confluent.

steps.title: Subject cells to FACS single cell sort into 96w plates
steps.instruction: Subject cells to FACS single cell sort into 96w plates.

steps.title: Expand growing clones and test for...
steps.instruction: Expand growing clones and test for integration of the homology arms by PCR.

steps.title: Prepare crude gDNA containing samples for...
steps.instruction: Prepare crude gDNA containing samples for this PCR as follows (from 96-well plate).

steps.title: Remove the medium and wash 1x with DPBS
steps.instruction: Remove the medium and wash 1x with DPBS.

steps.title: Add 20 µL Trypsin and incubate...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL Trypsin and incubate at 37 °C for ~3'.

steps.title: Stop the Trypsin with 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Stop the Trypsin with 100 µL of medium and pipette thoroughly.

steps.title: Transfer the suspension to a PCR...
steps.instruction: Transfer the suspension to a PCR plate and cover with a foil.

steps.title: Spin the plate for 2' in a plate centrifuge
steps.instruction: Spin the plate for 2' in a plate centrifuge.

steps.title: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS
steps.instruction: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS.

steps.title: Add 25 µL of MiliQ
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL of MiliQ.

steps.title: Cool down On ice and add...
steps.instruction: Cool down On ice and add 5 µL of proteinase K (2mg/ml in MiliQ, Sigma-Aldrich P6556).

steps.title: Incubate at 55 °C for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 55 °C for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: Stop the enzyme reaction at 95 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Stop the enzyme reaction at 95 °C for 00:10:00 . This is a very crude gDNA sample and serves for a quick initial check. Use 2.5 µL gDNA prep as template for 12 µL of PCR volume.

steps.title: Then test for the correct locus integration by PCR
steps.instruction: Then test for the correct locus integration by PCR.

steps.title: Assess the protein size and levels...
steps.instruction: Assess the protein size and levels of ATG9-GFP as compared to WT cells.

steps.title: Subject the clones passing this quality...
steps.instruction: Subject the clones passing this quality control step to a starvation assay checking the levels of autophagy markers.

steps.title: Also test cells for undesired Cas9...
steps.instruction: Also test cells for undesired Cas9 integration into the genome by WB.

steps.title: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS (1)
steps.instruction: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS (1).

steps.title: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS (2)
steps.instruction: Remove the medium carefully and wash with PBS (2).
